admin_toggle_note: You are managing global system settings.
api_key_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete your API Key? Existing integrations will lose access.
appearance_desc: Customize TeleCloud display style to your preference.
backup_desc_tg: The system will back up the SQLite database and all thumbnails, then upload them as a ZIP to your Log Group on Telegram. You can quickly find backup files using the #backup tag in the group.
backup_sqlite_only_note: Note: You are using MySQL/Postgres. The system will only back up thumbnails; you need to back up the database manually.
batch_dl_desc: Files are being downloaded sequentially to your browser.
bot_admin_ids_help: Telegram User IDs allowed to send files to sub-bots (comma-separated).
bot_pool_upload_folder_help: The folder where files received by sub-bots will be stored (defaults to TelegramUpload).
bot_save_some_failed: Some bot tokens failed verification. Please check or remove them.
bot_user_settings_desc: Configure your personal Telegram account. When you send a file to any sub-bot in the system, it will automatically appear in your own storage workspace.
bot_user_telegram_id_help: Your Telegram account ID for the bot to identify the sender.
bot_user_tip_desc: Send /getid to @get_all_telegram_id_bot to fetch your personal Telegram User ID.
bot_user_upload_folder_help: Your personal folder to store files uploaded from bots (e.g. TelegramUpload).
child_modal_warning: Please copy the account details below to share with the user.
child_toggle_note: This setting only applies to your account.
confirm_restart_app: Are you sure you want to restart the application? Active uploads or downloads may be temporarily interrupted.
delete_batch_msg: Are you sure you want to delete {n} selected items? This cannot be undone!
delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
delete_permanent_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this file? This action cannot be undone.
delete_user_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete user {u}? Their folder will be preserved.
empty_trash_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all items in the trash? This action cannot be undone.
err_admin_disabled: Admin has not enabled this feature for child accounts!
err_admin_forbidden_child_path: Admin cannot perform this action in a child account directory!
err_age_restricted: This video is age-restricted. Please add Cookies to download.
err_bot_failed: Bot failed to initialize during startup.
err_bot_peer_invalid: Bot is not added to the Log Group or lacks permission to send messages.
err_bot_timeout: Telegram connection timed out. Please try again.
err_bot_token_invalid: Invalid or expired bot token. Please check again.
err_bot_write_forbidden: Bot lacks Admin permission in the Log Group to send messages.
err_failed_to_connect: Could not connect to the remote server. Check the URL or your server connection.
err_failed_to_open_temp_file: Cannot open temporary file on server!
err_ffmpeg_missing: Server is missing FFmpeg to process this video.
err_filename_collides_child: Filename collides with a child account username!
err_folder_collides_child: Folder name collides with a child account username!
err_folder_exists: Folder with this name already exists in root!
err_forbidden_url: Cannot download from this URL (Internal IP blocked)!
err_geo_restricted: This video is blocked in the server's country (Geo-blocked).
err_insufficient_storage: Insufficient disk space on host server!
err_invalid_cookie_format: Invalid cookie format (Supports Netscape or JSON)
err_invalid_telegram_user_id: Invalid Telegram User ID (must be a number)!
err_invalid_username_format: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores and hyphens!
err_ip_blocked: You are blocked due to too many incorrect attempts!
err_move_loop: Cannot move folder inside itself or its children.
err_passkey_not_configured: Passkey is not configured on this system. Please configure this in the Admin account settings.
err_remote_failed: Connection to URL failed or refused.
err_remote_not_found: File not found at this URL (404 Not Found).
err_telegram_user_id_exists: This Telegram User ID is already configured by another account!
err_tg_msgid: Failed to get message ID from Telegram!
err_too_many_requests: Too many requests, please try again later!
err_video_mkv_apple_desc: Safari and Apple devices do not support streaming this video format. Please download the file to play it locally, or use another browser like Google Chrome.
err_video_private: This video is private (Requires own Cookies).
err_video_unsupported_apple: This video format may not be supported by Safari or Apple devices. Try downloading it or using another browser.
failed: file_too_large: Failed: File too large. Please clean up files to reduce size or perform a manual backup.
failed: telegram_send_error: Error: Could not send backup message to group
failed: upload_error: Error: Could not upload backup to Telegram
failed: zip_error: Error: Could not compress backup files
file_not_found_msg: File does not exist or link has been revoked.
force_password_change_msg: This is your first login or your password was reset. Please set a new password to continue.
host_storage_note: This reflects the free space on the host server. Please manage your storage accordingly as the system needs to store temporary files before uploading to Telegram.
name: Name
not_a_torrent_file: This is not a valid torrent file
overwrite_desc: Replace existing file and update messages.
passkey_desc: Use biometrics or security keys for faster and safer login.
passkey_name_prompt: Enter a name for this Passkey (e.g., My iPhone, MacBook...):
passkey_not_supported: Passkeys are not supported on this browser
passkey_origins_help: Allowed URLs, comma-separated. Must include protocol and port if applicable (e.g., https://cloud.example.com).
passkey_rpid_help: Your domain name (e.g., cloud.example.com). Leave empty for localhost.
paste_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to upload the pasted file(s) from your clipboard?
preview_blocked: Large file detected. Please view in full quality mode for the best experience.
preview_blocked_desc: This file exceeds the online preview size limit. Please download to view.
preview_error: Cannot load preview. Please download to view.
preview_manual: Do you want to preview this file?
preview_perf_warning: Performance Warning: This file is very large. Loading it online may consume high system resources, cause temporary freezing, or crash your browser (especially on mobile devices). Do you still want to preview it online?
privacy_disclaimer_desc: This system operates as a technical tool connecting to the Telegram API. The administrators and developers do not own, moderate, or locally host any user files. We assume zero legal liability for any content, files, or data uploaded, stored, or shared using this platform. Users are fully responsible under applicable laws for the legality of their data.
privacy_os_desc: TeleCloud is a non-profit, open-source cloud storage management platform developed solely for personal storage enhancement.
privacy_security_desc: Your privacy is our utmost priority. The platform implements strict user data isolation at all architectural levels to keep your metadata safe.
pushing_to_tg: Received all parts, pushing to Telegram...
range_warning: This URL does not support resuming. If a network error occurs, retrying will take significant time and bandwidth.
read_temp_dir_failed: Failed to read temporary download directory
remote_adding: Requesting server to download remote link...
remote_failed: Failed to download remote link via server.
remote_html_confirm_msg: This URL seems to lead to a web page (HTML) instead of a file. Are you sure you want to download it?
remote_poor_url_confirm_msg: This URL does not support resuming (Range Support). If the network is unstable, downloading will be very slow and cost a lot of bandwidth because it has to restart from the beginning. Do you still want to download it?
remote_range_buffer_desc: If the download URL does not support resume (Range) and the file is large (>200MB), the server will automatically buffer the file to local disk first to ensure a stable upload to Telegram without interruptions.
remote_upload_note: System will download the file directly to Telegram via the server.
rename_desc: Keep both files by adding a number to the name.
reset_admin_desc: Please set a new password for the admin account.
reset_password_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reset {u}'s password? A random temporary password will be generated and the user must change it on next login.
restore_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to restore the database from this backup? All current data will be overwritten and the system will restart immediately.
restore_desc: The system supports restoring data from backup ZIP files (containing database.db and master.key) or raw database files (.db, .sqlite). This process will close all active connections, clean up old WAL/SHM logs, overwrite the database, and automatically restart the application immediately.
restore_desc_mysql: The system supports restoring thumbnails and the encryption key (master.key) from the backup ZIP file. This process will close active connections, reload the key, and automatically restart the application immediately.
restore_warning_note: Important: Please do not close or reload this page during the restoration process. Once complete, the system will automatically restart and refresh the interface after 5 seconds.
revoke_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to revoke this share link? Others will no longer be able to access it.
s3_desc:
S3 compatible API for cloud storage. Access your files using S3 clients like Rclone or S3 Browser.
Note: Cloudflare Tunnel/Proxy limits uploads to 100MB.
setup_advanced_api_desc: By default, the system uses securely embedded developer API credentials. If your account is restricted or you prefer full control over your connections, you can create and enter your own personal API ID & API Hash from my.telegram.org.
setup_api_invalid: Invalid API ID or API Hash. Please double check at my.telegram.org
setup_api_saved: API details saved and applied successfully!
setup_bot_help: Secondary bots are optional and help distribute Telegram's message sending rate limits. Please add one or more bot tokens (from @BotFather). Each bot must be added to your Log Group and have Admin permission to send messages.
setup_bot_pool_suggest: Tip: Since you are using a custom storage group (not Saved Messages), you can configure the Bot Pool in Admin Settings after setup is complete to maximize upload/download speeds.
setup_complete_desc: All configurations have been saved successfully.
setup_desc: Create an admin account to continue
setup_desc_api: Enter your API credentials from my.telegram.org
setup_flood_wait: Too fast. Please try again in a few minutes.
setup_log_group_explain_group: Recommended. Keeps files organized, and enables Multi-bot (Bot Pool) to maximize upload/download speed and avoid Telegram rate limits.
setup_log_group_explain_me: Quick setup, no group needed. However, it will clutter your Saved Messages and disables Multi-bot support (secondary bots cannot access private Saved Messages).
setup_log_group_guide_desc:
Create a new Telegram group, enable 'Chat History' in the group settings, add bot @get_all_telegram_id_bot to the group and send /getid. The group ID will be displayed in the format -100xxxxxxxxxx, which is your LOG_GROUP_ID.
Or keep it as me (will clutter your Saved Messages).
setup_log_group_help: Enter 'me' for Saved Messages, or a Channel/Group ID.
setup_otp_invalid: Incorrect OTP code. Please check again.
setup_phone_invalid: Invalid phone number. Please check again (include country code, e.g., +1...)
setup_restart_note: Click the button below to restart the application and start all services.
setup_scan_qr_desc: Open Telegram on your phone, go to Settings > Devices > Link Desktop Device and scan this code.
share_modal_subtitle: Configure security options for your link
share_password_enable_desc: Require recipients to enter a password to access this link
share_password_prompt: Enter password for this share (leave empty for none):
slideshow_no_images_selected: No valid images found in the selection to play a slideshow
subtitles_help_index: The system will auto-load subtitles if you upload a subtitle file (.srt, .vtt, .ass) with the exact same name to the same directory! Alternatively, you can click Settings -> Subtitles -> Load from local... to select a file from your computer.
subtitles_help_share_file: Click Settings -> Subtitles -> Load from local... to upload a subtitle file from your computer.
subtitles_help_share_folder: Click Settings -> Subtitles to enable auto-detected subtitles or upload local subtitles.
toast_bot_user_saved: Telegram bot upload settings saved successfully!
toast_only_files: Please select files only for batch downloading.
toast_password_reset_msg:
Password for {u} has been reset. Temporary password: {p}
Save this and share it with the user. They will be required to change their password on first login.
toast_restore_success: Database restored successfully! The system is restarting...
toast_tg_timeout: Telegram connection timeout, please try again later.
toast_user_created_msg:
Account created. Temporary password: {p}
Save this and share it with the user. They will be required to change their password on first login.
torrent_desc: Download files via magnet links or .torrent URLs directly to your cloud.
torrent_disabled: Torrent support is disabled on this server
torrent_help_guide:
You can download content from the BitTorrent network in two ways:

  • Magnet Link: Paste a link starting with magnet:?xt=... into the input box and click Start Download.
  • .torrent File: Click the 'Select File' button above to upload a torrent file from your computer.

The system uses Aria2 for high-speed downloading and automatically pushes files to Telegram once finished.
torrent_invalid_input: Invalid magnet link or torrent URL
torrent_note: Files will be downloaded from the torrent network and uploaded to your Telegram automatically.
torrent_temp_dir_failed: Failed to create temporary directory for torrent
trash_desc: Manage deleted files. Items in trash will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
trash_note: Files here are automatically deleted after 30 days. Restore them if needed.
update_msg: A new version is available on GitHub. Do you want to see it?
upload_api_desc: Allow remote file upload via HTTP API with Bearer Token. Use for scripts, CI/CD, etc.
upload_api_param_async: Set to "true" to upload in background and get task_id immediately. Compatible with share mode.
upload_api_param_share: Set to "public" to share the file, or "folder" to share the parent folder.
upload_api_sync_note: Note: Cloudflare Tunnel/Proxy limits uploads to 100MB. For small files, avoid using async=true for best results.
upload_api_warning: Keep your API Key secret. Anyone with this key can upload files to your account.
upload_cancelled_waiting: Upload cancelled while waiting for slot
upload_torrent_desc: Select a local .torrent file to start downloading.
users_desc: Manage child accounts and their permissions.
wait_msg: Please do not close this page
webdav_desc:
Use TeleCloud as a network drive on your computer.
Note: Cloudflare Tunnel/Proxy limits uploads to 100MB.
webdav_note: Use admin account/password to connect. Host: web address, Protocol: HTTP/HTTPS, Port: application port, Path: /webdav
webdav_setup_guide:
The configuration depends on the WebDAV application you are using:

1. Separate Port field (e.g., RaiDrive)
  • Host: Your IP/Domain (without http or port)
  • Port: Enter the port number the web is running on
  • Path: /webdav
  • Protocol: HTTP (or HTTPS if you have SSL)
2. Only 1 URL field (e.g., Windows Map Network Drive)
  • Enter the full URL: http(s)://[IP]:[Port]/webdav

Summary: If asked for a separate Port, separate it. If only asked for URL, combine port into URL.
ytdlp_desc: Download media from YouTube, TikTok, and more directly to your cloud.
ytdlp_disabled: yt-dlp is disabled on this server
ytdlp_help_guide:
• Step 1: Paste the video or playlist URL into the search box.
  • Step 2: Click Fetch to let the system check available formats.
  • Step 3: Select your desired quality (Video + Audio or Audio Only) and click Start Download.
  • Cookies: If the video is age-restricted or requires login, use the Get cookies.txt locally extension to export cookies and upload them in the Cookie File section above.
ytdlp_note: Media will be downloaded to the server and uploaded to your Telegram automatically. Progress can be tracked in the upload queue.
